content.en:
After the Void Gate and the Great Ancestor of the Copper Mountain discussed, they went to make preparations and would attack the Ruins Stone Tower at any time.

Perhaps for them, it was not difficult to kill Ye Tian at all.

After all, if several fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms besieged an injured third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, even if Ye Tian rebelled against the sky, he would definitely not be able to turn the tables.

However, they didn't expect that Ye Tian had already broken through to the fourth stage, and even if he didn't break through, his strength was not comparable to that of ordinary fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

......

Not long after, the three figures quickly shuttled and came to the vicinity of the ruins stone tower.

"That Endless Ancestor is still in the Ruins Stone Tower, right?"

The Shadow Great Ancestor of the Void Gate.

"Well, it's still there, it seems that I went out once before, and I came back not long after!" said the Great Ancestor of Tongshan.

"Then don't waste time, and directly attack the Ruins Stone Tower!" the Void Ancestor urged.

However, their arrival had already attracted Ye Tian's attention.

Ye Tian had arranged a magic circle near the ruins stone tower, and if the Great Ancestor of the fourth stage arrived, it would naturally attract the attention of the Great Array, so that he would know about it.

Therefore, when the three Great Ancestors of Tongshan, Xuanying and Void arrived, Ye Tian directly knew about it and went out of the customs as soon as possible.

"Bronze Mountain Great Ancestor, he came with two fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, it seems that he wants to besiege me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't know the Xuanying Great Ancestor and the Void Great Ancestor, but judging from the breath, these should be the two Great Ancestors outside the Xuanqi Realm.

It's just not clear whether these two Great Ancestors are from the Outside Alliance, even if they are not, they are also Great Ancestors of other powerful forces outside the Boundary.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian walked out of the ruins stone tower, and the aura of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform was revealed.

When the Great Ancestor of Tongshan noticed Ye Tian's cultivation, his pupils suddenly shrank.

"How is it possible that you have stepped into the fourth stage?"

The Great Ancestor of Tongshan couldn't believe it at all, you must know that Ye Tian almost burned the immeasurable blood in order to severely damage the Great Ancestor of Junshan, and also urged the immeasurable supernatural power seed imprint, which seriously injured the foundation, and almost cut off the way forward, even if there is a treasure against the sky, it can't completely repair the foundation, and there is almost no hope of breaking through to the fourth stage!

And even if the potential is completely restored, the impact on the fourth stage will require a large amount of Void Golden Water, where did Ye Tian get so much Void Golden Water?

The Void Gate's Xuanying Great Ancestor and Void Great Ancestor also hesitated, not knowing whether to make a move or not.

You must know that Ye Tian has broken through to the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable life body realm, and he has the Golden God Armor Defensive Armor to protect his body, and his life-saving ability is too strong.

If Ye Tian was desperate, they would definitely not be able to escape the benefits, and they might even fall.

"Copper Mountain Great Ancestor, this Endless Great Ancestor has broken through, we can't take risks!"

Xuanying Great Ancestor said.

"Good!"

The Great Ancestor of Tongshan didn't dare to take any risks!

Before Ye Tian broke through, he could break out his hole cards and hurt him, so that he didn't dare to continue to shoot.

Now, Ye Tian has broken through to the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable life body realm, his strength will inevitably increase greatly, he is definitely no longer an opponent, even if he adds the Xuanying Great Ancestor and the Void Great Ancestor, he may not be able to win.

"Okay, retreat!"

The Great Ancestor of Tongshan answered.

Whew!!

Tongshan Great Ancestor and they retreated together, but Ye Tian naturally did not allow them to withdraw.

I saw that Ye Tian urged the power of the immeasurable supernatural power seed mark to condense into a sword, and immediately rushed towards the weakest Copper Mountain Great Ancestor.

With Ye Tian's current understanding and perception of the Infinite Divine Technique, the power of this sword is even more terrifying than the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique!

The Great Ancestor of Tongshan also noticed the horror of this sword, so he immediately urged his Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, the Transformation Technique, in an attempt to transfer the power of this sword.

However, the attack that Ye Tian used in the third stage at the beginning, he didn't completely transfer it, let alone the current full force attack!

Burst!!!

Ye Tian's sword sword tore through the Copper Mountain Great Ancestor's Infinite Extreme Dao Domain, breaking through the Transformation Technique, and directly piercing it.

A terrifying force erupted, annihilating part of the body of the Great Ancestor of the Copper Mountain.

With just one sword, the Great Ancestor of Tongshan was seriously injured and dying!

At this time, neither the Xuanying Ancestor nor the Void Ancestor dared to rescue the Tongshan Ancestor, and directly chose to escape.

Rumble!!!!

Another blow came, and it directly killed the Great Ancestor of Tongshan.

Subsequently, Ye Tian pierced the Void Ancestor with a sword from a distance, but he did not kill it.

In the blink of an eye, the Xuanying Great Ancestor and the Void Great Ancestor fled far away.

Ye Tian didn't go after the Void Great Ancestor, it was really because he didn't know the background of these two Great Ancestors, in case there was a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform behind them, it would definitely be very troublesome.

As for the Copper Mountain Ancestor, if you kill it, you will kill it, but there is no background behind the Copper Mountain Ancestor.

After killing the Great Ancestor of Tongshan, Ye Tian returned to the Ruins Stone Tower.

But this battle is still exposed, after all, the battle scope of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms is too large, and you can't pay attention to it!

Soon, the other forces in the Xuanqi Territory knew that the Great Ancestor of Tongshan had fallen.

Originally, there were two fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms in Tongshan City, but now that the Great Ancestor of Tongshan has fallen and the Great Ancestor of Junshan has been abolished, there are no high-level immeasurable lifeforms in Tongshan City in the fourth stage, and their strength has been directly reduced by a notch, and they have become an ordinary great force.

......

Somewhere in the territory of Genki.

The Xuanying Great Ancestor and the Void Great Ancestor converged again, and when they just escaped, they were separated, otherwise it would not be good to be served in a pot.

"Void Great Ancestor, are you okay?"

Xuanying Ancestor asked.

"I'm seriously injured, fortunately the Endless Great Ancestor didn't chase and kill me, otherwise I wouldn't have been able to escape!" The Void Great Ancestor looked frightened and said: "The strength of the Endless Great Ancestor is too terrifying, it definitely has the top combat power of the fourth stage, let alone us, even if it is a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that has been tempered five or six times, it is not his opponent!"

"We really shouldn't cooperate with that waste of Tongshan Great Ancestor, if we offend such a powerful Great Ancestor, we can't come to the Xuanqi Realm in the future, otherwise our identity will be exposed, and they will hold a grudge against the Void Gate, then it will be troublesome!

"Let's go, return to the Void Gate, and give up entering the Xuanqi Realm for the time being!"

level, the Xuanying Great Ancestor and the Void Great Ancestor left the Xuanqi Realm.
